chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Acquittal Appeal No. 308 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 13.04.2026 Mr. Zahoor-ul-Islam Advocate for the Appellant Ms. Farah Awan Advocate along with Respondent No. Noor Alam Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-. We have heard learned counsel for the appellant. Learned counsel has been unable to point out any misreading and non- reading of evidence in the judgment. He has failed to point out any jurisdictional issue nor any observation made by the learned trial Court which is perverse or contrary to law. Needless to say a double presumption of innocence also works in favour of the respondent. The appeal is yet to be admitted, hence, this Cr. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
